input_text: Menteri tu cakap nak bantu rakyat tapi naik kereta mewah. Hipokrit tahap dewa. Memang muka tak malu langsung.
reason: Rudely attacks a minister's character with personal insults rather than offering constructive policy criticism.
suggested_rewrite: Rakyat berharap wakil rakyat menunjukkan gaya hidup yang sederhana dan selaras dengan dasar penjimatan yang diwar-warkan.

input_text: Election results keluar je terus semua keyboard warriors keluar. You all ingat tweet boleh tukar kerajaan ke? Bodoh.
reason: Dismisses civic participation on social media with an insult, discouraging democratic engagement.
suggested_rewrite: Perbincangan politik dalam talian adalah sebahagian daripada proses demokrasi. Penting untuk semua pihak menyuarakan pendapat secara beradab.

input_text: Pegawai kaunter JPN tu memang kerja macam siput. Dah la muka masam, layan orang macam kita ni hamba dia.
reason: Rudely criticizes a civil servant's work attitude with demeaning comparison instead of filing a formal complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Perkhidmatan di kaunter JPN boleh ditambah baik dari segi kecekapan dan layanan mesra pelanggan. Maklum balas rasmi boleh membantu.

input_text: Orang kampung memang tak faham ekonomi. Undi ikut suka hati je lepas tu komplen hidup susah. Padan muka.
reason: Condescendingly dismisses rural voters as ignorant and blames them for their own economic hardship.
suggested_rewrite: Pendidikan politik perlu diperkasakan di semua kawasan supaya pengundi dapat membuat keputusan yang lebih bermaklumat.

input_text: Subsidi minyak asyik potong je tapi gaji menteri tak pernah turun. Rakyat makan pasir la macam ni.
reason: Uses dramatic exaggeration to criticize subsidy cuts while rudely implying government indifference to public welfare.
suggested_rewrite: Pengurangan subsidi perlu disertai langkah sokongan untuk golongan terjejas. Rakyat berharap kerajaan mengambil kira kesan terhadap kos sara hidup.

input_text: Aku dengar cerita YB kawasan tu guna duit peruntukan untuk beli tanah sendiri. Tak tau la betul ke tak tapi ramai cakap.
reason: Spreads an unverified rumor about a politician's alleged corruption with a hedged disclaimer that still amplifies the claim.
suggested_rewrite: Jika terdapat syak wasangka penyalahgunaan dana awam, laporan rasmi boleh dibuat kepada SPRM untuk siasatan lanjut.

input_text: Jiran sebelah buat renovation pukul 6 pagi setiap hari. Memang takde otak ke? Biadap betul manusia macam ni.
reason: Harshly insults a neighbor over renovation noise instead of addressing the issue through proper channels.
suggested_rewrite: Kerja renovasi pada waktu yang terlalu awal boleh mengganggu jiran. Elok berbincang secara baik atau rujuk peraturan JMB/PBT mengenai waktu yang dibenarkan.

input_text: PM cakap kos sara hidup terkawal. Dia pernah ke pasar ke? Memang duduk ivory tower tak turun-turun.
reason: Sarcastically mocks the PM as out of touch with dismissive tone rather than engaging with policy specifics.
suggested_rewrite: Rakyat merasai kenaikan harga barang di pasaran. Diharap kerajaan dapat meninjau semula mekanisme kawalan harga supaya lebih berkesan.

input_text: Setiap kali banjir, kerajaan negeri salahkan kerajaan pusat. Kerajaan pusat salahkan kerajaan negeri. Rakyat yang mati la macam ni.
reason: While highlighting a real governance issue, uses dramatic language implying government negligence causes deaths.
suggested_rewrite: Pengurusan banjir memerlukan kerjasama antara kerajaan persekutuan dan negeri. Rakyat berharap kedua-dua pihak dapat menyelaraskan usaha demi keselamatan semua.

input_text: Ceramah agama kat masjid tu cakap pasal politik je. Ustaz pun dah jadi alat propaganda sekarang ni.
reason: Dismissively accuses religious leaders of being propaganda tools, disrespecting the role of religious institutions.
suggested_rewrite: Ceramah di masjid seharusnya memberi fokus kepada ilmu agama dan pembangunan rohani. Isu politik boleh dibincangkan di platform yang lebih sesuai.

input_text: Budak China sekolah kebangsaan pun tak reti cakap BM. Mak bapak tak ajar ke? Tinggal kat Malaysia tapi macam asing.
reason: Targets Chinese Malaysian children with a dismissive generalization about language proficiency, implying they do not belong.
suggested_rewrite: Penguasaan bahasa Melayu penting untuk semua rakyat Malaysia. Program sokongan bahasa di sekolah boleh membantu murid yang memerlukan bantuan tambahan.

input_text: Hari Raya je mesti ada iklan touching pasal perpaduan. Lepas tu satu tahun gaduh balik. Hipokrit betul.
reason: Cynically dismisses unity efforts during festive seasons as hypocritical, undermining genuine reconciliation attempts.
suggested_rewrite: Semangat perpaduan yang ditonjolkan semasa perayaan seharusnya diamalkan sepanjang tahun. Usaha berterusan perlu untuk memupuk keharmonian masyarakat.

input_text: Orang atas memang tak kisah pasal kita bawah ni. Dekat parlimen gelak-gelak tidur je kerja. Menyampah aku.
reason: Expresses frustration with lawmakers using rude generalizations about parliamentary conduct.
suggested_rewrite: Ahli parlimen seharusnya menjalankan tanggungjawab dengan penuh dedikasi. Rakyat berhak menuntut akauntabiliti daripada wakil rakyat mereka.

input_text: Dah tau banjir setiap tahun tapi masih bina rumah kat situ. Lepas tu nangis minta bantuan. Siapa suruh degil.
reason: Blames flood victims for their situation in a dismissive and unsympathetic tone.
suggested_rewrite: Perancangan pembangunan perlu mengambil kira risiko banjir. Penduduk di kawasan berisiko memerlukan sokongan untuk penempatan semula atau infrastruktur perlindungan.

input_text: Cikgu sekolah rendah nak ajar anak aku pasal apa? Gaji pun ciput, nak mengajar moral pulak. Kelakar betul.
reason: Belittles teachers by linking their salary to their professional competence, disrespecting the education profession.
suggested_rewrite: Guru memainkan peranan penting dalam membentuk generasi akan datang. Gaji guru perlu ditambah baik agar bersesuaian dengan tanggungjawab mereka.

input_text: Semua ahli politik sama je. Sebelum pilihan raya janji macam-macam, lepas menang senyap. Menyesal aku undi.
reason: Dismisses the entire political class as dishonest with a sweeping generalization that discourages democratic participation.
suggested_rewrite: Rakyat berhak menuntut akauntabiliti daripada ahli politik yang dipilih. Pemantauan janji manifesto boleh dilakukan melalui saluran rasmi.

input_text: Hakim tu memang kena beli la. Kes jelas-jelas salah tapi lepas. Sistem undang-undang Malaysia ni memang rosak.
reason: Accuses the judiciary of corruption without evidence, undermining public trust in the legal system.
suggested_rewrite: Keputusan mahkamah yang meragukan boleh dicabar melalui proses rayuan. Ketelusan sistem kehakiman penting untuk mengekalkan kepercayaan rakyat.

input_text: Kerajaan bagi BR1M kat orang malas je. Yang rajin bekerja tak dapat apa-apa. Sistem memang tak adil.
reason: Labels social aid recipients as lazy, stigmatizing vulnerable communities while oversimplifying welfare policy.
suggested_rewrite: Bantuan sosial perlu disasarkan dengan lebih tepat agar memanfaatkan golongan yang benar-benar memerlukan, termasuk mereka yang bekerja tetapi berpendapatan rendah.

input_text: Wakil rakyat kawasan aku tu dah 3 penggal tapi longkang pun tak betul lagi. Makan gaji buta memang.
reason: Rudely accuses a representative of being incompetent without engaging through proper complaint channels.
suggested_rewrite: Infrastruktur asas seperti saliran perlu diberi perhatian oleh wakil rakyat. Aduan rasmi boleh dibuat kepada pejabat ADUN atau melalui sistem e-aduan.

input_text: Dah la cukai naik, tol naik, gaji tak naik. Nak harap kerajaan? Baik harap kucing.
reason: Sarcastically dismisses government economic management with a rude comparison rather than constructive criticism.
suggested_rewrite: Kenaikan cukai dan tol tanpa peningkatan gaji memberi tekanan kepada rakyat. Dasar ekonomi perlu seimbang antara pendapatan kerajaan dan kebajikan rakyat.

input_text: Polis trafik kat simpang tu hari-hari collect duit kopi je kerja. Semua orang tau tapi takde siapa berani tegur.
reason: Accuses traffic police of daily bribery as established fact without evidence, spreading distrust of law enforcement.
suggested_rewrite: Jika terdapat kes rasuah dalam kalangan polis trafik, rakyat boleh membuat aduan kepada SPRM atau melalui saluran aduan PDRM.

input_text: Tak percaya dah dengan hospital kerajaan. Doktor pun tengok pesakit 2 minit je. Baik pergi klinik swasta.
reason: Dismisses public healthcare quality entirely with a generalization that could discourage people from seeking affordable treatment.
suggested_rewrite: Hospital kerajaan menghadapi cabaran dari segi nisbah doktor-pesakit. Penambahan kakitangan dan peralatan boleh membantu meningkatkan kualiti rawatan.

input_text: Orang Melayu ni memang suka ambil mudah. Kerja sikit komplen penat, orang lain tu rajin tapi tak nampak pulak.
reason: Negatively stereotypes Malays as lazy while implicitly praising other races, promoting communal resentment.
suggested_rewrite: Semua rakyat Malaysia mempunyai potensi untuk bekerja keras. Sikap rajin dan dedikasi tidak terikat kepada mana-mana kaum.

input_text: India punya kenduri kahwin memang bising gila. Satu kampung kena dengar muzik sampai pukul 3 pagi. Takde pertimbangan langsung.
reason: Generalizes Indian weddings as inconsiderate and excessively noisy, targeting an ethnic group's cultural practice.
suggested_rewrite: Majlis keramaian perlu mematuhi peraturan had bunyi bising terutama pada waktu malam. Perbincangan dengan penganjur secara baik boleh menyelesaikan masalah ini.

input_text: Pos Malaysia ni dah tak boleh harap langsung. Parcel 3 minggu tak sampai, staff pun tak kisah. Bubar je la.
reason: Harshly dismisses Pos Malaysia's entire operations and calls for its dissolution rather than constructive feedback.
suggested_rewrite: Kelewatan penghantaran Pos Malaysia perlu ditangani segera. Penambahbaikan sistem penjejakan dan perkhidmatan pelanggan akan meningkatkan kepercayaan pengguna.

input_text: These civil servants think they own the country. Go to any government office, they act like they're doing you a favour. Useless bunch.
reason: Broadly insults all civil servants as useless and entitled, using rude generalizations instead of constructive feedback.
suggested_rewrite: Customer service standards at government offices could be improved. Formal feedback mechanisms can help address concerns about service quality.

input_text: Malaysian politicians are all clowns. Left wing, right wing, same circus. Don't waste your vote on any of them.
reason: Dismisses the entire political spectrum as a circus and discourages voting, undermining democratic participation.
suggested_rewrite: While frustration with political parties is understandable, exercising your right to vote remains important. Research candidates' track records before making your choice.

input_text: Every time got flood, same story. Government just gives out nasi bungkus and takes photos. After that, gone. Total joke.
reason: Cynically reduces disaster relief efforts to photo opportunities with a dismissive and mocking tone.
suggested_rewrite: Disaster response needs to go beyond immediate relief. Long-term flood mitigation plans and consistent follow-up support for affected communities are essential.

input_text: These people come to our country and don't even bother learning the language. Then complain when people don't understand them. Ridiculous.
reason: Uses vague 'these people' language to target immigrants or minorities, implying they don't belong and are unreasonable.
suggested_rewrite: Language learning programs for newcomers can help with integration. Multilingual societies benefit from mutual effort in communication and understanding.

input_text: I heard that new housing project is just a front for money laundering. My friend in the council told me. Cannot trust developers these days.
reason: Spreads an unverified rumor about a housing project being a money laundering front, citing an unverifiable insider source.
suggested_rewrite: If there are concerns about a housing developer's financial practices, reports can be made to the relevant authorities such as Bank Negara or the MACC.

input_text: Public transport in KL is a joke. They spend billions but still can't get buses to come on time. Monkeys could run it better.
reason: Uses a dehumanizing comparison to criticize public transport management rather than offering specific feedback.
suggested_rewrite: Public transport reliability in KL still needs significant improvement despite major investments. Better scheduling and real-time tracking could help commuters plan their journeys.

input_text: Malaysia's education system is producing robots, not thinkers. No wonder our graduates can't even string a proper sentence together.
reason: Dismisses Malaysian graduates broadly as incompetent and reduces the education system to a factory producing failures.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia's education system could benefit from a stronger emphasis on critical thinking and communication skills alongside academic achievement.

input_text: Another day, another corruption scandal. At this point I'm not even surprised. The whole system is rotten from top to bottom.
reason: Sweeping dismissal of the entire governance system as corrupt, promoting cynicism without acknowledging anti-corruption efforts.
suggested_rewrite: Repeated corruption cases are concerning. Supporting anti-corruption bodies and demanding greater transparency can help drive systemic improvement.

input_text: These delivery riders think the road belongs to them. Riding like maniacs, no helmet, cut queue everywhere. One day sure kena.
reason: Stereotypes all delivery riders as reckless and implicitly wishes harm upon them with 'one day sure kena'.
suggested_rewrite: Road safety among delivery riders is a concern that requires better enforcement and training. Platforms should ensure riders comply with traffic regulations.

input_text: Malaysian bosses are the worst. Expect you to work 12 hours but pay you peanuts. Modern slavery if you ask me.
reason: Broadly labels all Malaysian employers as exploitative and trivializes actual slavery through hyperbolic comparison.
suggested_rewrite: Work-life balance and fair compensation remain ongoing challenges in Malaysia's labour market. Strengthening labour laws and enforcement can help protect employee rights.

input_text: My neighbour's renovation has been going on for 6 months. Dust everywhere, noise nonstop. These people have zero consideration for others.
reason: Uses 'these people' to dehumanize neighbours and generalizes them as inconsiderate without attempting dialogue.
suggested_rewrite: Extended renovation work can be disruptive. Speaking with neighbours or contacting local authorities about noise and dust regulations may help resolve the situation.

input_text: Saw someone post the IC number of that rude grab driver online. Honestly he deserves it for being so rude to passengers.
reason: Endorses doxxing a person's IC number as justified punishment for rudeness, normalizing privacy violations.
suggested_rewrite: Sharing someone's personal identification details online is a serious privacy violation. If a driver was rude, the proper channel is to report through the Grab app.

input_text: GLC companies are just welfare programs for connected Malays. Meritocracy doesn't exist in this country.
reason: Racializes criticism of GLCs by targeting Malays specifically, framing affirmative action as racial favouritism.
suggested_rewrite: GLC governance and hiring practices should prioritize competence and transparency. Meritocratic reforms can strengthen both performance and public confidence.

input_text: Every year same thing — haze from Indonesia and our government just says 'monitoring the situation'. Absolutely pathetic leadership.
reason: Harshly dismisses government response to transboundary haze as pathetic without acknowledging diplomatic complexities.
suggested_rewrite: The recurring haze issue requires stronger bilateral agreements and enforcement. Citizens can push for more proactive diplomatic efforts and local air quality measures.

input_text: Local councils are just collecting assessment tax and doing nothing. Roads full of potholes, drains clogged. Where does the money go?
reason: Accuses local councils of misusing public funds with a dismissive tone instead of using formal accountability mechanisms.
suggested_rewrite: Local councils should be more transparent about how assessment tax revenue is allocated. Residents can request audited financial reports and attend council meetings to raise concerns.

input_text: People who support this government must be blind or getting paid. No sane person can look at these numbers and say things are fine.
reason: Insults government supporters as blind or bribed, demonizing those with different political views.
suggested_rewrite: People hold different views on government performance. Respectful debate based on data and evidence is more productive than questioning others' motives.

input_text: Heard from WhatsApp group that a minister's son got caught with drugs but case kena tutup. Typical la Malaysia.
reason: Spreads an unverified WhatsApp rumor about a politician's family while asserting it as typical behavior, amplifying distrust.
suggested_rewrite: Unverified claims from messaging groups should be treated with caution. If there is credible evidence of a cover-up, it should be reported to the relevant authorities.

input_text: These Bangla workers loitering outside the shop every evening, making people uncomfortable. Someone should call immigration on them.
reason: Targets Bangladeshi workers with xenophobic language, assuming they are illegal and calling for enforcement action based on their presence alone.
suggested_rewrite: Public spaces belong to everyone. If there are genuine safety concerns about loitering, they can be raised with local authorities without targeting specific nationalities.

input_text: Malaysian university rankings keep dropping. Lecturers more interested in politics than teaching. No wonder la like that.
reason: Dismissively blames lecturers for declining university rankings with an oversimplified and rude generalization.
suggested_rewrite: University rankings depend on many factors including research output, funding, and governance. A comprehensive review of higher education policies could help address the decline.

input_text: Just found out my kid's school replaced BM teacher with someone who can barely speak BM properly. Our education system is a circus.
reason: Publicly shames a teacher's language ability and dismisses the education system using insulting language.
suggested_rewrite: Teacher qualifications, especially for language subjects, should meet clear standards. Concerns about a specific teacher can be raised with the school administration.

input_text: That MP's press conference was so embarrassing. Can't even answer simple questions. Macam budak tadika yang kena soal.
reason: Mocks an MP with a childish comparison rather than substantively critiquing their policy position.
suggested_rewrite: Elected representatives should be well-prepared to address public questions. Media training and better briefings could improve communication with the public.

input_text: Overheard someone say the water treatment plant in PJ is contaminated but being covered up. Scary if true.
reason: Amplifies an unverified secondhand claim about water contamination that could cause public panic.
suggested_rewrite: Water quality concerns should be directed to SPAN or the local water authority for verification. Official testing results are publicly available on their website.

input_text: Parking attendant at the mall was so rude, I wanted to post his staff ID but decided not to. Someone else should though.
reason: Encourages others to doxx a worker's staff ID as retaliation for perceived rudeness.
suggested_rewrite: Rude service can be reported to the mall's management or customer service counter. Sharing employee details online is not appropriate.

input_text: 这些政客只会在选举前来拜票，选完了就消失。马来西亚的政治真的很烂。
reason: Sweepingly dismisses Malaysian politics as rotten based on politicians' election behaviour, promoting cynicism.
suggested_rewrite: 选民有权要求当选的政治人物履行竞选承诺。通过正式渠道追踪和监督政治人物的表现是推动改变的有效方式。

input_text: 听说那个部长的儿子用政府的钱出国旅行，不知道真不真。这种人当官真的是浪费纳税人的钱。
reason: Spreads an unverified rumor about a minister's son misusing public funds while treating it as likely true.
suggested_rewrite: 如果有关于公款被滥用的可靠信息，可以向反贪污委员会举报。未经证实的传闻不应随意传播。

input_text: 马来人做事总是慢吞吞的，去政府部门办事等到花儿都谢了。难怪效率这么低。
reason: Stereotypes Malays as slow workers and links it to government inefficiency, promoting racial prejudice.
suggested_rewrite: 政府部门的办事效率有待提高。改善流程和增加人手可以减少等候时间，这与种族无关。

input_text: 现在的年轻人只会整天玩手机打游戏，叫他们做点正经事就喊累。这代人真的没希望。
reason: Dismisses an entire generation as hopeless and lazy based on stereotypes about technology use.
suggested_rewrite: 每一代人面对不同的挑战和机遇。了解年轻人的兴趣和优势，可以帮助他们更好地发挥潜力。

input_text: 华人学校教出来的孩子马来文都不会讲，以后怎么在马来西亚生存？家长也不想想。
reason: Criticizes Chinese school education and parents for allegedly neglecting Malay language proficiency, implying cultural isolation.
suggested_rewrite: 掌握马来文对所有马来西亚人都很重要。学校和家长可以共同努力加强多语言教育，让孩子在多元社会中更好地沟通。

input_text: 邻居天天晚上唱卡拉OK到半夜，投诉了也没用。这种人真的没有公德心，活该被赶走。
reason: Harshly condemns a neighbour as lacking morality and wishes them evicted over noise complaints.
suggested_rewrite: 噪音问题可以通过业主委员会或地方当局来解决。正式的投诉渠道通常比网上抱怨更有效。

input_text: 那些外劳抢了本地人的工作，工资还越压越低。政府根本不管我们死活。
reason: Blames foreign workers for depressing local wages and accuses the government of indifference, combining xenophobia with political frustration.
suggested_rewrite: 外劳政策需要平衡经济需求和本地就业保障。政府应制定更完善的劳工政策来保护各方权益。

input_text: 大选结果出来了，选这个党的人脑子是不是有问题？国家要完蛋了。
reason: Insults voters who chose a particular party and uses alarmist language about the country's future.
suggested_rewrite: 选举结果反映了不同群体的诉求。尊重民主过程，通过建设性对话来推动国家进步更为重要。

input_text: 公立医院排队等几个小时，看诊只有两分钟。医生根本不把病人当人看。
reason: Accuses public hospital doctors of not treating patients as human beings, dehumanizing medical professionals under resource constraints.
suggested_rewrite: 公立医院面临医患比例失衡的问题。增加医疗资源和人手可以改善就诊体验，让医生有更多时间与病人沟通。

input_text: 听朋友说那个新开的餐厅用过期食材，不知道真不真。反正我是不敢去吃了。
reason: Amplifies an unverified food safety rumor that could damage a business's reputation based on hearsay.
suggested_rewrite: 食品安全问题可以向卫生局举报。未经证实的信息不应随意传播，以免造成不必要的恐慌或损害商家名誉。

input_text: 网上有人把那个乱停车的人的车牌号和住址都发出来了。虽然不太好，但他也确实该教训一下。
reason: Tacitly endorses doxxing by justifying it as a deserved lesson, normalizing privacy violations as punishment.
suggested_rewrite: 乱停车的问题应该向交通执法部门举报。在网上公开他人的个人信息是违法的，不应以此方式解决问题。

input_text: 市议会的人只会收税，路灯坏了三个月没人修。这些公务员真的是白吃饭的。
reason: Insults civil servants as freeloaders over infrastructure maintenance issues.
suggested_rewrite: 路灯维修等基础设施问题可以通过市议会的官方投诉渠道反映。持续跟进可以推动问题的解决。

input_text: 印度庙的节日庆祝每次都搞到半夜，音乐声吵死人。他们就不能小声点吗？
reason: Complains about Hindu temple celebrations in a dismissive way that shows insensitivity toward a community's religious practices.
suggested_rewrite: 宗教节日庆祝是多元文化的一部分。如果噪音影响到邻里，可以通过社区对话或地方当局协调合理的庆祝时间。

input_text: இந்த அரசாங்கம் தமிழ் பள்ளிகளை மூட நினைக்குது. நம்ம மொழியை அழிக்க பாக்குறாங்க. யாருக்கும் கவலையில்ல.
reason: Claims the government is trying to destroy Tamil language through school closures without evidence, stoking communal fear.
suggested_rewrite: தமிழ் பள்ளிகளின் நிலை குறித்த கவலைகளை கல்வி அமைச்சிடம் முறையாக எடுத்துரைக்கலாம். சமூக அமைப்புகள் மூலம் குரல் கொடுப்பது பயனுள்ளதாக இருக்கும்.

input_text: எங்க ஏரியாவில் ஒரு மலாய் குடும்பம் எப்பவும் சத்தம் போடுது. இவங்களுக்கு மரியாதை என்னன்னே தெரியாது.
reason: Singles out a Malay family and generalizes them as disrespectful based on their ethnicity.
suggested_rewrite: அண்டை வீட்டார் சத்தம் போடுவது தொடர்பான புகாரை உள்ளாட்சி அமைப்பிடம் தெரிவிக்கலாம். நேரடியாக பேசி தீர்வு காண்பதும் நல்லது.

input_text: தேர்தல் முடிவு வந்ததும் எல்லாரும் ஒண்ணா அழுதாங்க. இந்த கட்சிக்கு வோட் போட்டவங்க மூளை இல்லாதவங்க தான்.
reason: Insults voters of a particular party as brainless, demonizing political opponents.
suggested_rewrite: தேர்தல் முடிவுகள் ஏமாற்றமாக இருக்கலாம், ஆனால் ஜனநாயக செயல்முறையை மதிப்பது முக்கியம். அடுத்த தேர்தலில் மாற்றம் கொண்டுவர முயற்சிக்கலாம்.

input_text: அரசாங்க ஆஸ்பத்திரியில் தமிழில் பேசினா யாரும் புரிஞ்சுக்க மாட்டாங்க. நம்ம மக்களை மாடு மாதிரி நடத்துறாங்க.
reason: Uses dehumanizing comparison (treated like cattle) to describe Tamil speakers' experience at government hospitals.
suggested_rewrite: அரசாங்க மருத்துவமனைகளில் பல மொழி சேவைகள் மேம்படுத்தப்பட வேண்டும். தமிழ் மொழிபெயர்ப்பு சேவை கிடைக்கும் என்பதை உறுதி செய்ய வேண்டும்.

input_text: இந்த ஊர் கவுன்சில் தமிழர் பகுதியை எப்பவும் புறக்கணிக்குது. ரோடு ஒழுங்கா இல்ல, விளக்கு எரியாது. நம்மளை மனுஷனா பாக்கல.
reason: Frames infrastructure neglect as ethnic discrimination with a dehumanizing claim that Tamil areas are treated as subhuman.
suggested_rewrite: உள்கட்டமைப்பு பராமரிப்பு அனைத்து பகுதிகளுக்கும் சமமாக இருக்க வேண்டும். உள்ளாட்சி அமைப்பிடம் முறையான புகார் அளிப்பது சிக்கலை தீர்க்க உதவும்.

input_text: என் பக்கத்து வீட்டுக்காரன் வீட்டு நம்பரை ஒருத்தன் ஆன்லைனில் போட்டான். அவன் கார் தப்பா பார்க் பண்ணதுக்கு தண்டனை தான்.
reason: Justifies posting someone's home address online as deserved punishment for bad parking, endorsing doxxing.
suggested_rewrite: தவறான பார்க்கிங் பிரச்சனையை உள்ளாட்சி அமைப்பிடம் புகார் அளிக்கலாம். ஒருவரின் தனிப்பட்ட தகவலை ஆன்லைனில் பகிர்வது சட்டவிரோதம்.

input_text: WhatsApp-ல ஒரு வீடியோ வந்துச்சு, ஒரு அரசியல்வாதி லஞ்சம் வாங்குற மாதிரி. உண்மையா தெரியல ஆனா பார்த்தா நம்பத்தான் தோணுது.
reason: Spreads an unverified WhatsApp video claiming to show political bribery while expressing belief in its authenticity.
suggested_rewrite: சமூக ஊடகங்களில் பரவும் வீடியோக்களின் நம்பகத்தன்மையை சரிபார்க்க வேண்டும். ஊழல் சம்பந்தமான ஆதாரங்களை MACC-க்கு புகார் அளிக்கலாம்.

input_text: இன்னும் தமிழர்களுக்கு நிலம் கொடுக்கல, கோயில் இடிக்குறாங்க. இந்த நாட்டில் நாங்க இரண்டாம் தர குடிமக்கள் தான்.
reason: Frames land and temple issues as evidence that Tamils are treated as second-class citizens, combining religious and ethnic grievances provocatively.
suggested_rewrite: இந்து கோயில்கள் மற்றும் நிலப் பிரச்சனைகள் குறித்த கவலைகளை சட்டப்பூர்வ வழிகளில் எடுத்துரைக்கலாம். அனைத்து குடிமக்களின் உரிமைகளும் சமமாக பாதுகாக்கப்பட வேண்டும்.

input_text: கவர்ன்மென்ட் ஸ்கூல்ல படிச்சா என்ன ஆகும்? பிள்ளைகளை waste பண்றது தான். Teacher-களுக்கே ஒழுங்கா qualify இல்ல.
reason: Dismisses government school education as a waste and insults teachers' qualifications.
suggested_rewrite: அரசாங்கப் பள்ளிகளின் கல்வித் தரம் மேம்படுத்தப்பட வேண்டும். ஆசிரியர் பயிற்சி மற்றும் வளங்களை அதிகரிப்பது மாணவர்களுக்கு பயனளிக்கும்.

input_text: Aiya kenapa la orang macam ni. Every time parking pun tak reti, selfish gila. These people memang don't care about others one.
reason: Uses 'these people' in a dismissive BM-English code-switch to generalize and insult others over a parking issue.
suggested_rewrite: Masalah parking memang menjengkelkan. Boleh ambil gambar dan report kepada pihak pengurusan untuk tindakan.

input_text: Wah gomen announce new tax lagi. Every year naik je. Rakyat kena squeeze sampai kering, they don't care punya.
reason: Dramatizes tax policy with BM-English code-switching and accuses the government of callous indifference.
suggested_rewrite: Kenaikan cukai perlu disertai penjelasan tentang bagaimana ia memberi manfaat kepada rakyat. Transparency in government spending helps build public trust.

input_text: Eh you tau tak, that YB kena tangkap minum arak at the club but police let him go sebab dia VIP. Confirm punya la.
reason: Presents an unverified gossip about a politician and police favoritism as confirmed fact using BM-English code-switching.
suggested_rewrite: Cerita yang tidak disahkan tentang ahli politik perlu disemak kebenarannya. If there's evidence of wrongdoing, it should be reported to the proper authorities.

input_text: Malas la nak deal with JKR people. Everything kena bayar under table baru jalan. Corrupt habis system ni.
reason: Accuses JKR staff of systematic corruption as established fact without evidence, using BM-English code-switching.
suggested_rewrite: Jika terdapat pengalaman rasuah di mana-mana jabatan kerajaan, laporan boleh dibuat kepada SPRM. Proper documentation strengthens any complaint.

input_text: My Chinese neighbour buat BBQ every weekend, asap masuk rumah aku. Cakap pun tak guna, memang jenis tak nak dengar orang punya.
reason: Unnecessarily identifies the neighbour's ethnicity in a complaint about BBQ smoke, implying cultural fault.
suggested_rewrite: Asap BBQ yang masuk ke rumah jiran boleh mengganggu. Cuba berbincang secara baik atau hubungi pengurusan bangunan untuk penyelesaian.

input_text: Dengar cerita orang, that factory in Klang dumping toxic waste into the river. Entah betul ke tak but I'm not drinking tap water anymore.
reason: Amplifies unverified claims about industrial pollution that could cause unnecessary public alarm about water safety.
suggested_rewrite: Kebimbangan tentang pencemaran sungai boleh dilaporkan kepada Jabatan Alam Sekitar. They can investigate and ensure water treatment meets safety standards.

input_text: Aku share la that viral video of the road bully. Nampak clear muka dia and plate number. Orang macam ni patut kena exposed.
reason: Encourages sharing identifiable details of a person in a viral video as vigilante justice instead of reporting to police.
suggested_rewrite: Video road bully boleh dijadikan bukti dan dilaporkan kepada polis. Sharing someone's face and plate number publicly could lead to harassment.

input_text: Alamak these kampung folks really cannot drive in KL la. Masuk highway pun tak tau guna signal. Go back la kampung.
reason: Mocks rural drivers with a dismissive 'go back' remark, creating an urban-rural divide.
suggested_rewrite: Road safety awareness is important for all drivers. Programs to improve driving skills, especially for highway use, would benefit everyone on the road.

input_text: Bro, that politician punya wife beli handbag RM50k with taxpayer money apparently. Someone posted the receipt online. Mesti betul la.
reason: Treats an unverified online receipt as proof of misuse of public funds and endorses sharing private financial details.
suggested_rewrite: Dakwaan penyalahgunaan wang rakyat perlu disiasat oleh pihak berkuasa yang berkenaan. Unverified documents circulating online should not be taken at face value.

input_text: Walao eh, these Mat Rempit race every night kat my taman. Polis tak buat apa langsung. Useless gila la authorities ni.
reason: Labels authorities as completely useless with aggressive language over a legitimate safety concern.
suggested_rewrite: Aktiviti lumba haram di kawasan perumahan membahayakan penduduk. Buat laporan polis secara rasmi dan follow up regularly for action.

input_text: Sekarang ni makan kat mamak pun dah mahal gila. Roti canai RM2.50 what nonsense. Dulu 50 sen je. Country going backwards la.
reason: Uses food price inflation to dramatically declare the country is regressing, oversimplifying economic conditions.
suggested_rewrite: Kenaikan harga makanan memberi kesan kepada semua golongan. Kerajaan perlu memantau harga barangan keperluan and ensure fair pricing mechanisms are in place.

input_text: Abang Grab tu bawa macam nak mati. I complain kat app tapi nothing happen. Should just post his face online biar semua tau.
reason: Threatens to publicly expose a Grab driver's identity as retaliation for reckless driving instead of using proper channels.
suggested_rewrite: Pemanduan bahaya oleh pemandu e-hailing perlu dilaporkan melalui app dan juga kepada JPJ. Escalate the complaint if the initial report was not addressed.

input_text: Macam mana la nak maju kalau education system masih stuck in the 90s. Minister pun cakap je lebih, action takde.
reason: Dismisses the education minister as all talk and no action with a rude generalization.
suggested_rewrite: Pembaharuan sistem pendidikan memerlukan tindakan nyata, bukan sekadar pengumuman. Stakeholders should actively engage in education reform discussions.

input_text: 真的是受不了了，setiap bulan bil TNB naik. 政府 cakap nak bantu rakyat tapi越帮越忙。
reason: Sarcastically dismisses government assistance using BM-Chinese code-switching, claiming help makes things worse.
suggested_rewrite: 电费上涨确实影响民生。Rakyat boleh semak sama ada layak mendapat rebat elektrik dan menyuarakan kebimbangan kepada wakil rakyat.

input_text: Ini orang memang kurang ajar. Park kereta block jalan then when you tegur, dia marah balik. 真是没教养的人。
reason: Insults someone as ill-mannered using both BM and Chinese in a personal conflict over parking.
suggested_rewrite: Double parking yang menghalang laluan boleh dilaporkan kepada pihak berkuasa tempatan. 拍照记录可以作为投诉的证据。

input_text: Boss aku ni memang tak guna. 每天加班到半夜 tapi bonus takde langsung. 这种公司真的是剥削员工。
reason: Insults employer as useless and accuses company of exploitation in BM-Chinese code-switching.
suggested_rewrite: Kerja lebih masa tanpa pampasan yang sewajarnya boleh dilaporkan kepada Jabatan Tenaga Kerja. 了解劳工法律有助于保护自己的权益。

input_text: Rumah sebelah 天天放那么大声的音乐, langsung tak considerate. Macam ni punya jiran memang 让人受不了。
reason: Harshly complains about noisy neighbours using BM-Chinese code-switching with personal insults.
suggested_rewrite: Masalah bunyi bising dari jiran boleh diselesaikan dengan berbincang secara baik。如果问题持续，可以向管理委员会投诉。

input_text: Aku dengar dari Telegram group tu, 那个拿督拉 ada simpan duit haram kat luar negara. Tak tau betul ke tak tapi 看起来很可信。
reason: Spreads an unverified Telegram rumor about a Datuk's alleged illicit funds abroad using BM-Chinese code-switching.
suggested_rewrite: 未经证实的消息不应随意传播。Jika ada bukti kukuh mengenai pengubahan wang haram, laporan rasmi boleh dibuat kepada SPRM.

input_text: Orang tua sekarang ni memang outdated. Asyik suruh anak jadi doctor or lawyer. 他们根本不了解现在的job market。思想落后。
reason: Dismisses older generation's career advice as backward-thinking in a disrespectful BM-Chinese code-switch.
suggested_rewrite: Generasi terdahulu mungkin kurang familiar dengan peluang kerjaya baru. 耐心沟通和分享最新的就业趋势有助于让父母理解孩子的职业选择。

input_text: Government hospital tu 每次去都要等很久。Dah la staff rude gila, 好像我们欠他们的一样。
reason: Rudely generalizes hospital staff as rude using BM-Chinese code-switching instead of providing specific feedback.
suggested_rewrite: Hospital kerajaan sering menghadapi kesesakan pesakit。提升服务质量和增加人手可以改善整体体验。Maklum balas rasmi boleh membantu penambahbaikan.

input_text: 这些politician memang pandai cakap je。到了 election time baru datang 握手拍照。选完了就 hilang。真的很假。
reason: Cynically dismisses all politicians as insincere using BM-Chinese code-switching.
suggested_rewrite: 政治人物应在非选举期间也与选民保持联系。Rakyat boleh menuntut akauntabiliti melalui dialog dengan wakil rakyat secara berterusan。

input_text: Hari tu aku nampak sendiri that Datuk punya anak drive Lamborghini. Gaji menteri mana cukup beli tu. Mesti rasuah punya.
reason: Jumps from observing an expensive car to accusing corruption without any evidence, using BM-English code-switching.
suggested_rewrite: Gaya hidup mewah ahli politik boleh menimbulkan persoalan. If there are legitimate concerns about undeclared wealth, it can be reported to the MACC.

input_text: Kalau orang India complain pasal kuil kena roboh, sure kena label as anti-national. 但华人庙被拆的时候也一样没人管。双重标准。
reason: Frames temple demolition complaints as evidence of systemic double standards across ethnic lines using BM-Chinese-English code-switching.
suggested_rewrite: Isu rumah ibadat memerlukan penyelesaian yang adil untuk semua komuniti。通过法律途径和社区对话可以更有效地解决这些问题。

input_text: DBKL enforcement officers are a joke la. Tegur street vendor kecik je tapi big company langgar peraturan tak buat apa. Selective enforcement memang.
reason: Accuses DBKL of selective enforcement with a dismissive comparison but provides no specific evidence.
suggested_rewrite: Enforcement should be applied consistently regardless of business size. Citizens can report cases of non-compliance through DBKL's official channels.

input_text: These MLM people on my Facebook are so annoying. Hari-hari post fake income screenshots. Penipuan berleluasa tapi kerajaan buat tak tau.
reason: Labels all MLM activity as fraud and accuses the government of willful neglect using BM-English code-switching.
suggested_rewrite: Skim MLM yang meragukan boleh dilaporkan kepada Kementerian Perdagangan Dalam Negeri. Sentiasa semak status pendaftaran syarikat sebelum menyertai apa-apa program.

input_text: Tak payah la hantar anak sekolah kebangsaan. Kualiti macam longkang. Better send to private school if you can afford.
reason: Insults national school quality using a crude comparison, discouraging public education enrollment.
suggested_rewrite: Sekolah kebangsaan mempunyai kelebihan tersendiri termasuk kepelbagaian. Improvements in teaching quality and resources would further strengthen the national school system.

input_text: Pekerja kilang tu kena buli habis-habisan but bila report HR takde action. Corporate Malaysia memang protect the abusers.
reason: Generalizes all of corporate Malaysia as protecting abusers based on one incident, using BM-English code-switching.
suggested_rewrite: Workplace bullying should not be tolerated. Jika HR tidak bertindak, aduan boleh dibuat kepada Jabatan Tenaga Kerja atau melalui Talian Kasih.

input_text: Auntie kat market tu memang suka tipu timbang. Every time kurang sikit. Orang Cina berniaga memang macam tu la.
reason: Racializes a complaint about a market vendor by generalizing dishonesty to all Chinese traders.
suggested_rewrite: Jika timbangan di pasar tidak tepat, aduan boleh dibuat kepada KPDN. Dishonest practices are not linked to any particular race.

input_text: Budak intern kat office aku ni memang useless. Gen Z semua macam ni ke? Suruh buat kerja sikit pun tak boleh. Hopeless generation.
reason: Generalizes an entire generation as hopeless based on one intern's performance using BM-English code-switching.
suggested_rewrite: Intern mungkin memerlukan bimbingan dan latihan lebih. Every generation brings different strengths, and mentorship helps bridge the gap.

input_text: KTM delay lagi hari ni. Dah berapa kali ni bulan ni? Pengurusan memang bangang. How hard is it to run trains on time?
reason: Uses vulgar language to insult KTM management over train delays instead of filing a formal complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Kelewatan KTM yang kerap berlaku perlu ditangani segera. Commuters should file complaints through official channels to push for improved scheduling.

input_text: Orang yang sokong GST tu memang tak pernah susah hidup. Duduk rumah besar, drive BMW, suruh rakyat miskin bayar lebih. Out of touch betul.
reason: Attacks GST supporters personally by assuming their wealth and dismissing their view rather than engaging with the policy debate.
suggested_rewrite: Perbincangan mengenai GST perlu mengambil kira kesan kepada semua golongan pendapatan. Dialog terbuka tentang cukai yang adil lebih produktif daripada serangan peribadi.

input_text: Jabatan Imigresen punya counter staff semua macam robot. Senyum pun tak boleh ke? Kerja kerajaan memang buat orang jadi kayu.
reason: Dehumanizes immigration staff as robots and wood, insulting all government workers.
suggested_rewrite: Layanan mesra di kaunter kerajaan boleh ditambah baik melalui program latihan perkhidmatan pelanggan. Maklum balas positif juga boleh diberikan apabila layanan baik diterima.

input_text: Pilihanraya kecil pun boleh kena blackout? Mesti kerajaan yang sengaja tutup internet. Takut rakyat nampak penipuan.
reason: Baselessly accuses the government of deliberate internet blackout during by-elections to cover fraud.
suggested_rewrite: Gangguan internet semasa pilihanraya perlu disiasat untuk memastikan ketelusan proses demokrasi. Laporan boleh dibuat kepada SPR dan MCMC.

input_text: Kawan aku forward gambar IC orang yang langgar kereta dia dan lari. Aku rasa patut share supaya orang ramai boleh kenal pasti.
reason: Advocates sharing someone's IC image publicly as a way to identify a hit-and-run suspect instead of involving police.
suggested_rewrite: Kes langgar lari perlu dilaporkan kepada polis bersama bukti yang ada. Menyebarkan gambar IC seseorang di media sosial melanggar undang-undang privasi.

input_text: Aku baca kat group WhatsApp, katanya vaksin COVID tu ada microchip. Entah betul ke tak, tapi buat aku takut nak vaksin.
reason: Amplifies a debunked vaccine conspiracy theory from WhatsApp while expressing personal fear that could discourage vaccination.
suggested_rewrite: Maklumat mengenai vaksin perlu diperoleh daripada sumber rasmi seperti KKM dan WHO. Khabar angin di WhatsApp sering tidak tepat dan boleh membahayakan kesihatan awam.

input_text: Makcik cleaner kat office aku kerja lambat sangat. Orang Indonesia memang macam tu kot. Tak boleh harap.
reason: Stereotypes Indonesian workers as unreliable based on one cleaner's performance, combining xenophobia with workplace rudeness.
suggested_rewrite: Jika terdapat masalah prestasi kerja, ia perlu dibincangkan dengan pihak pengurusan secara profesional. Kualiti kerja tidak bergantung kepada kewarganegaraan seseorang.

input_text: Doktor klinik kesihatan tu dah la lambat, attitude pun teruk. Macam kita ni datang mengemis rawatan. Tak sedar ke gaji dia dari cukai kita?
reason: Rudely attacks a doctor's attitude and frames public healthcare as a taxpayer entitlement to belittle the professional.
suggested_rewrite: Pengalaman yang kurang memuaskan di klinik kesihatan boleh dilaporkan melalui borang aduan rasmi. Hubungan doktor-pesakit yang baik perlu dipupuk dari kedua-dua pihak.

input_text: Kakitangan KWSP tu macam takde urgency langsung. Orang menunggu berjam-jam, dia boleh pulak pergi minum. Makan gaji buta.
reason: Harshly accuses EPF staff of laziness and taking breaks while customers wait, using insulting language.
suggested_rewrite: Masa menunggu yang lama di kaunter KWSP boleh dikurangkan dengan penambahbaikan sistem giliran dan penambahan kaunter pada waktu puncak.

input_text: Orang muda sekarang nak kahwin pun tak mampu sebab kerajaan tak jaga ekonomi. Tapi menteri boleh pulak nikah 4. Double standard.
reason: Uses a provocative comparison between youth economic struggles and politicians' personal lives to stoke resentment.
suggested_rewrite: Kos hidup yang tinggi memang memberi kesan kepada golongan muda. Dasar perumahan dan kewangan yang mesra belia perlu diutamakan untuk membantu mereka merancang masa depan.

input_text: Zaman sekarang polis pun dah jadi macam gangster. Tegur sikit kena saman, tanya soalan kena marah. Rakyat takut dengan polis sendiri.
reason: Compares police to gangsters in a sweeping generalization that undermines public trust in law enforcement.
suggested_rewrite: Hubungan antara polis dan rakyat perlu diperkukuhkan melalui polisi komuniti. Aduan tentang layanan polis boleh disalurkan melalui EAIC.

input_text: Sekolah agama ni buat apa sebenarnya? Budak keluar pun tak boleh cari kerja. Buang masa dan duit je.
reason: Dismisses religious schools as a waste of time and money, disrespecting religious education.
suggested_rewrite: Sekolah agama boleh diperkasakan dengan memasukkan kurikulum kemahiran vokasional dan teknikal supaya graduan lebih berdaya saing dalam pasaran kerja.

input_text: Taxi driver KL semua penipu. Meter tak mau guna, harga sesuka hati. Tourist pun kena tipu. Malu la negara kita.
reason: Labels all KL taxi drivers as cheats with a sweeping generalization that damages the profession.
suggested_rewrite: Penguatkuasaan penggunaan meter teksi perlu diperketatkan oleh SPAD. Penumpang boleh melaporkan pemandu yang menolak menggunakan meter melalui saluran rasmi.

input_text: NGO ni semua cari makan je. Konon nak tolong orang tapi duit derma masuk poket sendiri. Tak percaya dah aku.
reason: Accuses all NGOs of embezzling donations without evidence, discouraging charitable giving.
suggested_rewrite: Penderma berhak menuntut ketelusan daripada NGO. Semak pendaftaran dengan ROS dan laporan kewangan sebelum membuat sumbangan.

input_text: Government bagi subsidi diesel kat nelayan konon. Tapi nelayan kat kampung aku cakap tak pernah terima pun. Siapa makan duit tu?
reason: Implies diesel subsidies are being siphoned based on one anecdotal account, suggesting corruption without evidence.
suggested_rewrite: Jika subsidi diesel tidak sampai kepada nelayan yang layak, aduan boleh dibuat kepada Jabatan Perikanan atau KPDN untuk siasatan lanjut.

input_text: That housing developer ran away with everyone's deposit. Someone should find his home address and teach him a lesson.
reason: Advocates finding a developer's home address for vigilante justice instead of pursuing legal action.
suggested_rewrite: If a housing developer has absconded with deposits, buyers should lodge a police report and seek legal recourse through the Housing Tribunal.

input_text: I saw the new councillor's salary slip being shared on Twitter. RM15k for doing nothing. These bloodsuckers.
reason: Endorses sharing a private salary slip online and insults the councillor as a bloodsucker.
suggested_rewrite: Councillor remuneration should be publicly disclosed through official channels. Sharing private documents without consent raises privacy concerns.

input_text: The Malay special rights debate is so tired. Other races built this country too but we always get treated like outsiders.
reason: Frames the special rights debate as exclusionary toward non-Malays in a way that could inflame communal tensions.
suggested_rewrite: All Malaysians have contributed to the nation's development. A constructive dialogue about inclusive policies that uplift all communities is needed.

input_text: 信了那个保健品的广告，花了几千块结果没效果。这种骗子公司政府都不管的吗？
reason: Labels a health product company as a scam and accuses the government of inaction without specifying if it was actually illegal.
suggested_rewrite: 购买保健品前应检查是否获得卫生部批准。如果产品存在虚假宣传，可以向消费者投诉中心举报。

input_text: 有人在Facebook上发了那个欠钱不还的人的全部资料，名字地址电话都有。虽然他确实欠钱，但这样做过分了吧。不过也算活该。
reason: Acknowledges doxxing is excessive but ultimately justifies it as deserved, normalizing privacy violations for debt disputes.
suggested_rewrite: 债务纠纷应通过法律途径解决，如小额索偿法庭。在网上公开他人个人信息是违法的，不论对方是否欠债。

input_text: Dengar kata that factory kena shut down because of environmental violation tapi reopened next week sebab boss kenal orang atas. 真的是有钱能使鬼推磨。
reason: Spreads an unverified claim about a factory bypassing environmental regulations through political connections using BM-Chinese-English code-switching.
suggested_rewrite: 如果有证据显示工厂违反环境法规后获得特殊对待，可以向环境局和反贪会举报。Unverified claims should not be spread as fact.

input_text: Ustaz kat TV tu ceramah pasal sabar tapi dalam WhatsApp group kutuk orang lain. Someone leaked the screenshots. Hipokrit betul.
reason: Endorses the leaking of private messages to expose a religious figure while using it to attack religious leaders generally.
suggested_rewrite: Tokoh agama perlu mengamalkan apa yang diajarkan. However, leaking private conversations is a privacy violation regardless of who is involved.

input_text: 每次 raya haji 那些马来邻居 korban lembu的时候，整条街都是血腥味。受不了。能不能找个 proper place 来做？
reason: Complains about Hari Raya Haji korban practices in an insensitive way that disrespects a significant religious observance.
suggested_rewrite: Ibadah korban是重要的宗教活动。Pihak berkuasa tempatan boleh menyediakan kawasan khusus yang memenuhi keperluan kebersihan dan keselesaan semua penduduk.

input_text: Aku ada screenshot conversation dia mengaku dia tipu client. Should I post it online supaya semua orang tau siapa dia sebenarnya?
reason: Contemplates publicly posting private screenshots to expose someone, seeking validation for doxxing behavior.
suggested_rewrite: Bukti penipuan perlu diserahkan kepada polis untuk siasatan rasmi. Menyebarkan perbualan peribadi secara online boleh mendedahkan anda kepada tindakan undang-undang.

input_text: எல்லா politician-ம் ஒரே மாதிரி தான். பணம் சம்பாதிக்க வேணும் அவ்வளவு தான். Rakyat punya nasib யாருக்கும் முக்கியம் இல்ல.
reason: Sweepingly dismisses all politicians as only money-driven using Tamil-BM code-switching.
suggested_rewrite: அரசியல்வாதிகளின் செயல்திறனை கண்காணிப்பது முக்கியம். Rakyat perlu menuntut ketelusan dan akauntabiliti daripada wakil rakyat melalui saluran rasmi.

input_text: Orang kaya je yang boleh hidup senang kat Malaysia ni. Yang miskin makin miskin. Sistem memang designed untuk kita gagal.
reason: Claims the system is intentionally designed to keep the poor failing, promoting hopelessness and class resentment.
suggested_rewrite: Jurang pendapatan memang satu cabaran besar. Dasar ekonomi yang inklusif dan peluang pendidikan yang saksama perlu diperkukuhkan untuk mobiliti sosial.

input_text: Klinik 1Malaysia dah tutup tapi ganti dengan apa? Takde apa. Janji kosong macam biasa. PM memang pandai tipu rakyat.
reason: Accuses the PM of being a skilled liar over a policy change without exploring the actual replacement programs.
suggested_rewrite: Penutupan Klinik 1Malaysia perlu disertai alternatif perkhidmatan kesihatan mampu milik. Rakyat berhak mengetahui program gantian yang disediakan.

input_text: Kat area aku semua kedai mamak dah kena ambil alih oleh pekerja asing. Orang tempatan dah takde tempat nak kerja. Rasa macam bukan negara sendiri.
reason: Frames foreign worker presence in mamak restaurants as displacement of locals, stoking xenophobic sentiment.
suggested_rewrite: Kebergantungan kepada pekerja asing dalam sektor tertentu perlu ditangani melalui dasar yang menggalakkan penglibatan pekerja tempatan dengan gaji yang berpatutan.

input_text: Kawan forward satu artikel pasal menteri ada rumah banglo kat London. Tak pasti betul ke tak tapi kalau betul memang tak patut.
reason: Spreads a forwarded unverified article about a minister's alleged overseas property while lending it credibility.
suggested_rewrite: Artikel yang tidak disahkan perlu disemak kebenarannya sebelum dikongsi. Jika terdapat dakwaan pemilikan harta yang mencurigakan, ia boleh dilaporkan kepada SPRM.

input_text: Peniaga pasar malam sekarang semua penipu. Jual barang tiruan letak harga mahal. Orang biasa macam kita ni memang kena kencing je la.
reason: Labels all night market traders as fraudsters selling counterfeits, damaging an entire livelihood sector.
suggested_rewrite: Penjualan barangan tiruan boleh dilaporkan kepada KPDN untuk tindakan penguatkuasaan. Pengguna disarankan membeli daripada peniaga yang dipercayai.

input_text: Someone just posted the phone number of that rude cashier at the supermarket. I mean she was really rude but posting her number is a bit much. Then again, karma.
reason: Tacitly endorses doxxing a cashier's phone number by framing it as karma for rudeness.
suggested_rewrite: Rude service can be reported to the store management. Posting someone's personal phone number online is a privacy violation and could lead to harassment.

input_text: Kalau tengok cara kerajaan handle isu rohingya, memang nampak sangat diorang tak kisah pasal rakyat sendiri. Asyik jaga orang luar je.
reason: Frames refugee assistance as neglect of citizens, pitting Rohingya against Malaysians.
suggested_rewrite: Bantuan kemanusiaan dan kebajikan rakyat bukan perkara yang saling bercanggah. Kedua-duanya perlu diurus dengan bijak oleh kerajaan.

input_text: That viral TikTok of the datuk slapping his driver. Everyone is sharing it but nobody cares about the driver's privacy. At least the datuk kena exposed la.
reason: Endorses public exposure of a person while acknowledging the privacy issue, normalizing selective doxxing as justice.
suggested_rewrite: Assault cases should be reported to the police, not handled through viral videos. Both the victim's and accused's rights must be protected through proper legal channels.

input_text: These insurance agents are all liars. Promise everything when selling but when you claim, suddenly got 1001 excuses. Con artists the lot of them.
reason: Labels all insurance agents as liars and con artists, unfairly stigmatizing an entire profession.
suggested_rewrite: Claim disputes with insurance companies can be escalated to Bank Negara's complaint mechanism. Choosing agents with proper LIAM certification helps ensure better service.

input_text: Our national football team is a disgrace. Coach pun entah siapa ambil dari mana. Might as well send my grandmother to coach, same result.
reason: Mocks the national football coach with a disrespectful comparison, insulting both the coach and the team.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysian football has room for improvement. Investing in grassroots development and professional coaching standards could help the national team achieve better results.

input_text: My Malay colleague always takes long lunch breaks for Friday prayers and then some. The rest of us have to cover for them. So unfair.
reason: Frames Friday prayer accommodation as unfairness and links it to a Malay colleague's work ethic, mixing racial and religious insensitivity.
suggested_rewrite: Workplace policies should clearly outline prayer time accommodations and ensure workload is distributed fairly among all team members.

input_text: Tamil schools are holding back Indian kids. They come out and can't compete in the real world. Parents are wasting their children's future.
reason: Dismisses Tamil vernacular education as a hindrance, blaming parents for choosing mother-tongue education.
suggested_rewrite: Tamil schools can be strengthened with bilingual programs that maintain cultural identity while also preparing students for the broader job market.

input_text: 看到那个议员在国会睡觉的照片就火大。这种人凭什么拿纳税人的钱？简直是社会的蛀虫。
reason: Calls a parliamentarian a social parasite over a sleeping photo, using dehumanizing language.
suggested_rewrite: 国会议员在会议期间应保持专注。选民可以通过正式渠道要求其代表认真履行职责。

input_text: Malaysian drivers are the worst in Southeast Asia. No signal, double parking, road hogging. It's like nobody here passed their driving test properly.
reason: Broadly insults all Malaysian drivers as the worst in the region, making sweeping negative generalizations.
suggested_rewrite: Road safety in Malaysia could benefit from stricter enforcement and improved driver education programs. Campaigns promoting responsible driving habits would help all road users.
